dialogos.texto_en: The aquarium was so much fun!\nI'm completely satisfied!
There were sooo many beautiful fish.
I checked out the museum shop too, but\nnothing really caught my eye.
Oh, looking for souvenirs?\nI took a quick look too,\nbut couldn't find anything either.
I'm starting to feel anxious about finding something.
It's too early to worry yet.\nWe're only halfway through our trip.
(If worse comes to worst, I'll just think of something,\n since I was the one who suggested it%p-2;――%p;)
(Hm? Ichika... Is she shaking a little?)
Oh, yeah, a bit. I might have gotten a lil' \nchilly from that cafe's air conditioning.\nBut it's warm outside, so I'll be okay in a bit.
Anyway, what should we do now? According to our plans,\nwe were supposed to explore Ocean Expo Park\nbefore heading to Araha Beach.
The map shows that it's quite expansive.
Yes, there are various facilities,\nsuch as the Oceanic Culture Museum\nand botanical gardens.
Then, let's have some free time again.\nWe'll meet up at the designated time.
